STS2_MULUNDUS-ABYSSAL_JOURNEY_POWER.desc: You lose 1 max HP each turn unless you are poisoned.
STS2_MULUNDUS-ABYSSAL_JOURNEY_POWER.smar: You lose 1 max HP each turn unless you are poisoned.
STS2_MULUNDUS-INVOKE_YOUR_OATH_POWER.des: Each attack you play this turn is played an additional time.
STS2_MULUNDUS-INVOKE_YOUR_OATH_POWER.sma: Each attack you play this turn is played an additional time.
STS2_MULUNDUS-SUGAR_RUSH_POWER.descripti:
At the start of your turn, each card in your hand gains [gold]Ethereal.[/gold]
Whenever you play a [gold]Goodberry[/gold], draw a card.
STS2_MULUNDUS-SUGAR_RUSH_POWER.smartDesc:
At the start of your turn, each card in your hand gains [gold]Ethereal.[/gold]
Whenever you play a [gold]Goodberry[/gold], draw a card.
STS2_MULUNDUS-SUGAR_RUSH_POWER.title: Sugar Rush
STS2_MULUNDUS-BLOOMING_FORM_POWER.descri: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, ALL enemies gain 2 [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-BLOOMING_FORM_POWER.smartD: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, ALL enemies gain 2 [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-BLOOMING_FORM_POWER.title: Blooming Form
STS2_MULUNDUS-CLOAK_OF_WILTING_POWER.des: Gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] at the start of each turn.
STS2_MULUNDUS-CLOAK_OF_WILTING_POWER.sma: Gain {Amount:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
STS2_MULUNDUS-LIVING_BASTION_POWER.descr: At the start of your turn, gain 2 [gold]Plating[/gold] and [gold]Heal[/gold] 1 HP.
STS2_MULUNDUS-LIVING_BASTION_POWER.smart: At the start of your turn, [gold]Heal[/gold] 2 HP.
STS2_MULUNDUS-LIVING_BASTION_POWER.title: Living Bastion
STS2_MULUNDUS-LIFE_ON_THE_EDGE_POWER.des: At the start of your turn, draw 2 additional cards if you're [gold]poisoned[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-LIFE_ON_THE_EDGE_POWER.sma: At the start of your turn, draw 2 additional cards if you're [gold]poisoned[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-BRAMBLE_MANTLE_POWER.title: Bramble Mantle
STS2_MULUNDUS-CUTTING_EDGE_POWER.descrip: Whenever you gain a debuff, deal 3 damage to a random enemy.
STS2_MULUNDUS-CUTTING_EDGE_POWER.smartDe: Whenever you gain a debuff, deal {Amount} damage to a random enemy.
STS2_MULUNDUS-CUTTING_EDGE_POWER.title: Cutting Edge
STS2_MULUNDUS-SERRATED_BARBS_POWER.smart:
Damage dealt by your [gold]Thorns[/gold] is tripled.
Every time you are dealt damage, remove 1 [gold]Thorns[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-SERRATED_BARBS_POWER.title: Serrated Barbs
STS2_MULUNDUS-CURSORS_LOG_POWER.descript: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, put a random card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] that costs the same as the exhausted card on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-CURSORS_LOG_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, put a random card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] that costs the same as the exhausted card on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-CURSORS_LOG_POWER.title: Cursor's Log
